T
CSS Toggle Library
30 toggles · MIT
Pure CSS · Copy & paste

30 CSS toggles,
free to copy.

A library of 30 switches, checkboxes and radios built with pure CSS — no JavaScript, no dependencies. Copy the self-contained CSS for any toggle, or grab a ready-made Prompt to have your coding agent recreate it. Each snippet defines its own theme tokens and respects prefers-reduced-motion.

Click a toggle to copy its CSS 30 toggles
01

Classic Pill

02

Accent

03

Square

04

Outline

05

Check / Cross

06

On / Off

07

Sun / Moon

Glow
